experience.title: Junior Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Collaborated with senior designers to create visual content for various marketing campaigns.
Assisted in the development of a new branding strategy with a focus on digital platforms.
achievements: Increased social media engagement by 25% through innovative design.

experience.title: Technical Support Specialist
responsibilities: Provided technical support for software applications in a customer service environment.
Trained new staff on software usage and troubleshooting techniques.
achievements: Resolved 90% of support tickets within the first 48 hours.

response.summary: Creative professional with a background in graphic design and technical support, seeking to transition into software engineering.
